free_text: High-resolution study of the 113Cd(n,g) spectrum by
statistical decay model with discrete levels and
Guided cold neutron beam with a thermal
placed at 90 deg relative to the beam (1 mm2 diam.)
Extrapolation of the measured cold neutron cross
section to the thermal energy assuming 1/v-dependence
The deviation from 1/v-dependence can make a few %
difference in the thermal equivalent cross section
Not corrected for background and pile-up
A large negative value at 511 keV in the data set is
due to annihilation peak subtraction procedure.
Not corrected for background and pile-up
